title: Reactive UI Stream with Backpressure Flow Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Build a custom React state hook that orchestrates high-frequency message streams under memory thresholds, dropping frames or batching state updates dynamically based on browser render cycles. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Transactional Outbox Engine with WAL Ingestion Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Build a low-latency database poller that scans transactional outbox records and emits events to a broker. Must guarantee exactly-once delivery under crashes. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: GraphQL Gateway with Depth and Rate Limiting Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Create a GraphQL proxy that checks query depth, counts complexity scores, and blocks nested cycles to prevent Denial of Service (DoS) attacks. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Proctored CI/CD Telemetry Pipeline Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Orchestrate a pipeline that spins up isolated VM containers, runs verification tests, and publishes proctoring telemetry (network activity, files altered). (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: CRDT-Based Offline-First Mobile Sync Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Build an offline notes database that captures local edits and performs structural synchronization once internet connectivity returns. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Canvas-Based High-Frequency Chart Ingestor Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Build a Canvas chart component that renders 50,000 ticks per second, implementing raw pixel caching and custom WebGL contexts to bypass DOM overhead. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Distributed Consensus Raft Simulator Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Implement a simplified Raft consensus engine with leader election, heartbeats, and log replication. Simulate network partitions and clock drifts. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Chunked File Upload Gateway with Integrity Checks Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Build a file gateway that ingests large binaries in parallel chunks, checks SHA-256 hashes on the fly, and merges them securely. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Kubernetes Custom Operator for Active Monitoring Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Implement a custom operator that monitors pod memory limits, handles auto-scaling under high thread counts, and restricts unauthorized VMs. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Low-Latency Telemetry Sensor Buffer Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Create a low-latency mobile module that buffers device accelerometer data in SQLite, compressing payloads before uploading. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Optimistic State Cache with Rollback Log Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Build a state machine that handles optimistic UI updates, tracking a historic transaction log to roll back changes smoothly if background operations fail. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Memory-Mapped Key-Value Store with Write-Ahead Log Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Create a persistent key-value store that reads directly from memory-mapped files and records mutations to a binary write-ahead log for recovery. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Operational Transformation Chat Editor Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Build a collaborative text editor utilizing Operational Transformation (OT) over WebSockets, resolving insertion conflicts gracefully. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Dynamic Reverse Proxy with SSL Termination Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Build a lightweight reverse proxy in Node that dynamically routes traffic based on server loads, handles SSL handshake, and blocks VMs. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Native Thread Bridge batching engine Part 1
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Create a low-overhead React Native bridge module that batches rendering requests, bypassing bridge bottlenecks under high frame rates. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Virtualized List with Dynamic Height Caching Part 2
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Create an infinity scroll component that handles 100,000 dynamic-height elements with sub-millisecond recalculation and asynchronous image lazy loading. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Event-Driven CQRS Pipeline with Backpressure Part 2
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Orchestrate an event pipeline that ingests write operations, publishes to a lock-free queue, and asynchronously updates read-optimized stores. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).

title: Server-Sent Events Pipeline with Connection Recoverer Part 2
description: [Next-Gen Challenge] Orchestrate a high-throughput Server-Sent Events (SSE) server with custom backoff, packet queuing during offline states, and authentication checks. (Proctored sandbox: anti-AI heuristics detect copy-paste patterns, VM hardware signatures, and invalid keystroke rhythms).
